image_dependency: question_text explicitly says to choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the core information is visual rather than textual
the task depends on reading a chemical structure depiction and ignoring arrows, which cannot be recovered from text alone
multi_step: the solver must parse the depicted transition-state chemical structure and then map it to one of 4 candidate SMILES strings
the options differ by substituent placement and aromatic attachment patterns, so selection likely requires comparing multiple structural details rather than single-token lookup
this is still a single-answer multiple-choice task, so the reasoning depth appears moderate rather than very high
verifiability: choices are provided and answer_text exactly matches one listed option, enabling direct answer checking
answer_type=short_text with a concrete SMILES string is straightforward to compare against the gold answer
asset_registry_record shows answer_present=true, question_present=true, and registry_passed=true, supporting reliable downstream validation
